title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nerolac Select

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nerolac Select
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
